title: Communauté de communes Pays de Nérondes
summary: The communauté de communes Pays de Nérondes is located in the Cher  département  of the Centre-Val de Loire region of France. It was created on 1 January 2007 and its seat is Nérondes. Its area is 250.3 km2, and its population was 4,879 in 2018.
text:
The communauté de communes Pays de Nérondes is located in the Cher  département  of the Centre-Val de Loire region of France. It was created on 1 January 2007 and its seat is Nérondes. Its area is 250.3 km2, and its population was 4,879 in 2018.
